result: The cleaned dataset has been successfully created at data/output/cleaned_data.csv with 16,111 observations and 3 variables (NSID, bmi25, bmi32). The script loaded all 4 input files, merged them using full_join by NSID, harmonized missing value codes according to the standard (-9=Refusal, -8=Don't know, -1=Not applicable, -2=Script error, -3=Not asked), and applied appropriate labels to the BMI variables.
